Hey there is Shaoshu aka May! Currently graduated from UCD with a master degree of Computer Science and pursuing a software engineer job in Ireland! I'm a passionated programmer who likes problem-solving and constantly learning new skills. I wish making sure every bit counts and readable since I joined this community.
